positive: Stylized abstract forest scene, featuring a central silhouette of intertwined mossy roots and ancient glowing bioluminescent flora. The color palette should be deep jewel tones—emerald, sapphire, amethyst—with pops of brilliant cyan and golden yellow light radiating from the organisms. Use high contrast etching style, reminiscent of woodcut prints but with modern luminosity. Composition must be perfectly balanced and centered, ideal for repeating patterns or central placement on apparel. The background should be mostly deep, velvety indigo to maximize the contrast with the glowing foreground elements. Flat vector art quality with textural depth, perfect for screen printing.
